title: ceratostylis loheri
intro: Ceratostylis loheri, also known as Loher's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, specifically found in the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis loheri include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
